helper_landscape_summary: Three 2024-2025 Onsager references treat reciprocity in physical/info-geom gradient flow; none target NN cross-layer feedback-attenuation.

hints.hint_text: Symmetric L Onsager covered classically; check if candidate is relabeling reciprocity for NN parameter dynamics.
Feedback-attenuation tied to layer depth may be the novel kernel.
Composition Onsager L + grad flow + residual feedback.
Info-geom gradient flow already subsumes natural-gradient class.
Cross-layer index structure of L (between layers) vs within-layer.

solver_traces.search_query: Onsager symmetric matrix neural network parameter dynamics
solver_traces.reasoning: Entropy 2025-07 treats Onsager as IG gradient flow; not NN cross-layer.

solver_traces.search_query: layer depth gating feedback attenuation transformer
solver_traces.reasoning: Layer-depth gating exists (Highway, gated residual) but not Onsager-symmetry-constrained.

solver_traces.search_query: Onsager gradient flow residual stream LLM
solver_traces.reasoning: Composition L + grad flow + residual feedback not jointly published.
Natural-gradient family is symmetric-metric-based but does not invoke cross-layer reciprocity.
No Q1 2026 preprint found; lag risk plausible.
Between-layer coupling exists in interp work but not as symmetric Onsager matrix.

tree_stream_rationale: No hint anticipated, but max per_hint_sim 0.50 (H1 Onsager IG gradient flow adjacency). Tree-stream defers to step 10 mechanical FAIL (3 keyword hits). H3 not_anticipated (0.20) supports composition novelty; aggregate verdict FAIL from step 10 keyword rule.
